steps.title: Use the given intercept and slope as points
steps.content: The statement $f(0)=5$ gives the point $(0,5)$. Since the slope is $74$, increasing $x$ by $1$ increases $f(x)$ by $74$, so a second point is $(1,79)$.

steps.title: Write the line
steps.content: In slope-intercept form $f(x)=mx+b$, the slope is $m=74$ and $f(0)=5$ gives $b=5$. Therefore $f(x)=74x+5$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer is the only equation with slope $74$ and $f(0)=5$. Therefore D is correct.
